div.div: The way to deposit your research depends on the type of output. We offer a range of content deposit services. More information is available here.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 207px; height: 1px; padding-top: 0px; margin-left: 264px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; max-height: 150px; overflow: hidden;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;
div.p: Following review and content checks, deposited research outputs are then made available in Apollo.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 222px; height: 1px; padding-top: 200px; margin-left: 485px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; max-height: 200px; overflow: hidden;

p.span: While Apollo is primarily an open access, institutional repository, there are situations where content is subject to different
levels of access restrictions. Several dissemination workflows are available within the repository to deal with

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 207px; height: 1px; padding-top: 0px; margin-left: 718px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; max-height: 150px; overflow: hidden;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;
div.p: Apollo content is enriched with full metadata from external publisher sources, and research outputs are linked with related, supplementary materials when published

div.font: We are committed to the responsible and sustainable management of research outputs deposited in Apollo and to ensure long-term access to those works. To ensure safe archival and prevent loss of data, a robust backup strategy is in place for all repository content.
